title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: 1. The integrated comment and the kernel-council fallback artifact are produced in different stages, so they can legitimately disagree without any code drift. [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1929) generates the integrated comment in `integrate` (`aggregate-tutti-votes.sh` at L1969, `generate-tutti-comment.sh` at L2006), while [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L829) runs `codex-implement` only after `tutti` outputs are done (L835-L837). A later council recovery-pass cannot retroactively change that earlier integrated comment. 2. The integrated comment path does not read council artifacts at all; it only reads lane artifacts. In [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1950), `integrate` downloads only `agent-result-*`, then computes `baseline_trio_reason` from those results via [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L177). So `missing-claude` can appear even if a separate council run produced a Gemini fallback artifact. 3. There is real ref/checkout drift between Tutti and Council execution paths. `codex-implement` checks out `.fugue-orchestrator` with no explicit `ref` and executes council scripts from that checkout ([fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L500), [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L737), [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L1036)). Tutti run-agents checks out `.fugue-orchestrator` pinned to `ref: v7` ([fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L703)). This can run different script revisions for “comment path” vs “council path”. 4. The pinned `.fugue-orchestrator` checkout in Tutti is often bypassed by path preference, which can hide drift. Run-agent steps prefer `scripts/harness` in the primary checkout and only fall back to `.fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness` if missing ([fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L761), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L762), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1330)). With normal checkout, `scripts/harness` exists, so `v7` checkout may not actually be used. 5. Even inside `fugue-tutti-router`, orchestrator refs are inconsistent across jobs if `.fugue-orchestrator` is used. `resolve-orchestrator` checks out `.fugue-orchestrator` at dynamic workflow ref ([fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L2108), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L2122)), while run-agents uses fixed `v7` ([fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L706), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1274)). If fallback-to-`.fugue-orchestrator` is triggered in one job but not another, behavior can diverge within one run.
